instructions.title: MASTER LAUNCH v2 - 6 creatives/brand (1 poster + 5 video), 2 separate LIVE campaigns
instructions.instruction:
MASTER LAUNCH RUNBOOK v2 - EXECUTE EXACTLY, do NOT re-plan. Build TWO SEPARATE campaigns (one per brand) - different pixel, different creatives, NEVER shared. Both LIVE at exactly RM4/day each. Objective = website SALES -> Purchase. 6 creatives per brand (1 poster gpt-image-2 + 5 video gemini 10s), one CBO + one ad set, 6 ads. CRITICAL: each ad's COPY is paired to its OWN visual below - keep them together, never swap copy between creatives. If a tool errors, retry once then continue with what succeeded; only STOP+WhatsApp if the ad account is not writable.

STEP 1 - peninglab get_balance (owner topped up). Generate all 12 creatives via Fire-and-Poll: fire in batches of 3-4 in parallel, poll get_status by task_id, NEVER re-generate a slot that already has a task_id. Save each asset URL. Each creative = its VISUAL prompt + its paired COPY (primary text + headline). Poster is 1:1; videos are vertical 9:16, 10s, spoken Bahasa Melayu, (no subtitles).

=== PENINGBOT (WhatsApp-green #25D366, Bahasa Melayu) ===
PB-P  POSTER (gpt-image-2) - angle: comparison
  VISUAL: "Clean 1:1 us-vs-them table, dark bg + WhatsApp-green #25D366. Two columns 'Balas Manual' vs 'PeningBot'. Rows: Reply 2 jam / 2 saat; After-hours Tutup / 24 jam; Sales Rugi / Closing automatik. Bold Malay text in safe zone, no watermark."
  COPY: primary="Balas lambat = customer lari. PeningBot jawab automatik 24 jam, tangkap setiap lead. Setup 5 minit, dari RM35/bulan." headline="Stop kehilangan sales lewat malam"

PB-V1 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: founder
  VISUAL: "MY male SME owner 30s in a small shop, phone in hand, warm daylight, handheld, film grain, realistic."
  DIALOGUE (BM, lip-synced): "Penat balas WhatsApp sampai pukul 3 pagi? PeningBot balas customer automatik 24 jam dalam 2 saat. Cuba di peningbot dot com."
  COPY: primary="Owner kedai? Berhenti balas WhatsApp sorang-sorang. Auto-reply 24/7, dari RM35." headline="Auto-reply 24/7 - 5 minit setup"

PB-V2 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: 3am loss / fear
  VISUAL: "POV dark bedroom 3am, phone on nightstand buzzing with 99+ unread WhatsApp + red badges, owner stirring. Tense, cinematic."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Customer WhatsApp tengah malam, esok dah beli kat orang lain. Jangan biar sales lari masa kau tidur."
  COPY: primary="Customer tanya tengah malam - PeningBot jawab automatik dalam 2 saat. Dari RM35/bulan." headline="Jangan hilang sales masa tidur"

PB-V3 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: before/after day
  VISUAL: "Split: LEFT a stressed owner replying to the phone non-stop all day; RIGHT the same owner relaxed while the phone auto-replies. Warm."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Dulu balas WhatsApp sampai penat. Sekarang PeningBot buat automatik. Aku boleh rehat."
  COPY: primary="Stop balas WhatsApp sorang-sorang sepanjang hari. PeningBot auto-reply 24/7." headline="Rehat - bot yang balas"

PB-V4 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: demo
  VISUAL: "Screen-record of a WhatsApp chat: PeningBot auto-replies a customer, then a notification appears 'Sale closed: RM120'. Clean UI, green accents."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Tengok - PeningBot balas customer automatik, tapis lead, dan beritahu bila ada closing."
  COPY: primary="Auto-reply + tangkap lead + notify bila closing. Setup 5 minit." headline="Closing automatik di WhatsApp"

PB-V5 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: testimonial
  VISUAL: "Relatable MY shop owner speaking casually to camera, authentic UGC style, daylight."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Dulu aku rugi sebab lambat balas. Lepas guna PeningBot, customer dibalas dalam saat. Sales naik."
  COPY: primary="73% usahawan rugi sebab lambat balas WhatsApp. PeningBot selesaikan - dari RM35." headline="Balas dalam saat, bukan jam"

=== PENINGLAB (dark #0a0a0a + orange #f97316 + lime #c8f53e, Bahasa Melayu) ===
PL-P  POSTER (gpt-image-2) - angle: before/after cost
  VISUAL: "Bold 1:1 split, dark bg + orange/lime. LEFT BEFORE: tired creator with camera 'RM500 . 1 minggu . 1 video'. RIGHT AFTER: phone grid of 10 TikTok thumbnails 'RM0.40 . 3 minit . 10 video'. Energetic Malay, safe zone, no watermark."
  COPY: primary="Bayar RM300 untuk 1 video je? Paste link TikTok Shop, dapat 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit. RM0.40 sebijik." headline="10 video UGC dalam 3 minit"

PL-V1 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: cost-shock demo
  VISUAL: "Screen-record, dark UI orange accents: a hand pastes a TikTok Shop link, then 10 UGC video thumbnails generate rapidly."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Bayar RM300 untuk satu video je? Paste link TikTok Shop, dapat 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit, RM0.40 sebijik. Cuba di peninglab dot com."
  COPY: primary="Generate 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit. RM0.40 sebijik. Mula RM35/bulan." headline="10 video / 3 minit"

PL-V2 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: competitor FOMO
  VISUAL: "Split montage: a competitor rapidly posting 10 AI videos in a day vs a tired seller filming one manually. Energetic, dark/orange."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Kompetitor post 10 video sehari guna AI. Kau masih shoot manual? Macam mana nak lawan?"
  COPY: primary="Kompetitor mass-post guna AI. Generate 10 video sehari, RM0.40 sebijik. Scale TikTok Shop kau." headline="Scale dengan AI"

PL-V3 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: full flow
  VISUAL: "Screen-record: paste a link, pick an avatar persona, 10 finished UGC videos ready to download. Slick dark/orange UI."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Paste link, pilih avatar, dapat 10 video UGC siap post. Semua dalam 3 minit."
  COPY: primary="Auto-generate 10 UGC video dari satu link TikTok Shop. Tak payah shoot, tak payah edit." headline="Dari link ke 10 video"

PL-V4 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: aspiration
  VISUAL: "A relaxed young MY creator sipping coffee while a phone shows TikTok Shop sales notifications rising. Warm, energetic."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Buat duit affiliate sambil minum kopi. Generate 10 video sehari, scale TikTok Shop jadi RM10k sebulan."
  COPY: primary="Post lebih banyak, jual lebih banyak. 10 video UGC sehari dengan AI. Mula RM35." headline="Scale TikTok Shop jadi RM10k/bulan"

PL-V5 VIDEO (gemini 10s) - angle: hijabi / no-camera
  VISUAL: "An AI avatar (hijab option) confidently presenting a product, studio look, dark/orange."
  DIALOGUE (BM VO): "Tak nak depan camera? Guna AI avatar, hijab pun ada. 10 video UGC, 3 minit."
  COPY: primary="Malu depan camera? AI avatar buat untuk kau - hijab option ada. 10 video, 3 minit." headline="UGC tanpa depan camera"

STEP 2 - RESOLVE via zernio: accounts_list_accounts(platform=metaads) -> social account _id; ads_list_ad_accounts -> MYR account act_943036532064443 ('Pening'); connect_list_facebook_pages -> page id of 'bisnesowner2021'. Confirm write access (list campaigns). If not writable, STOP + WhatsApp owner.

STEP 3 - CREATE PENINGBOT campaign (zernio ads_create_standalone_ad): goal=conversions; promoted_object={pixelId:'986352420917190', customEventType:'PURCHASE'}; tracking pixel 986352420917190; budget_amount=4 budget_type=daily budget_level=campaign (CBO); countries=['MY'] age_min=25 age_max=45 broad (NO detailed interests); page=bisnesowner2021; link_url='https://peningbot.com'; call_to_action='LEARN_MORE'; status=ACTIVE. ONE ad set, 6 ads = PB-P, PB-V1..PB-V5, each using ITS OWN asset + ITS OWN paired primary/headline. Campaign name 'PeningBot - Sales - launch'.

STEP 4 - CREATE PENINGLAB campaign (SEPARATE): goal=conversions; promoted_object={pixelId:'1013990424497184', customEventType:'PURCHASE'}; tracking pixel 1013990424497184; budget RM4/day CBO; countries=['MY'] age_min=22 age_max=40 broad; page=bisnesowner2021; link_url='https://peninglab.com'; call_to_action='LEARN_MORE'; status=ACTIVE. ONE ad set, 6 ads = PL-P, PL-V1..PL-V5, each with its own asset + paired copy. Campaign name 'PeningLab - Sales - launch'. (If 'LEARN_MORE' rejected, use 'SIGN_UP'.)

STEP 5 - NOTIFY+LOG: WhatsApp owner via whacenter (number $WHACENTER_DEFAULT_TO): one message 'LIVE: PeningBot + PeningLab (separate campaigns) launched. RM4/day each, Sales. 12 creatives. Campaign ids + creative URLs: ...'. Append full report to _shared/reports/launch.md.

HARD RULES: two SEPARATE campaigns; never share pixel/creative; each ad keeps its own paired copy+visual; both LIVE at exactly RM4/day; do not exceed budget; do NOT analyse existing ads - pure create+launch.
